4-cbc.dose_note: Note: Be careful and read the summary before ingesting this substance.
4-cbc.name: 4-cbc

properties.avoid: Drugs that can raise blood pressure, such as stimulants.
properties.dose: Oral Light: 40-70mg Common: 70-100mg Strong: 100-130mg | Insufflated: Light: 30-50mg Common: 50-80mg Strong: 80-100mg. | Note: Be careful and read the summary before ingesting this substance.
properties.summary: It is a potentially very neurotoxic cathinone. No scientic reports have been noted on the neurotoxicity or cardiotoxicity, please use with extreme caution.
